news.t: Basic Materials ETFs Poised for a September Bounce

holdings.infoBox: FMAT is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are Linde stock at 15.11%, Newmont at 7.37%, Freeport-McMoRan at 6.35%, The Sherwin-Williams Company at 4.77%, and CRH plc at 4.75%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Materials Index ETF (FMAT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA IMI Materials 25/50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the US basic materials sector across the entire market-cap spectrum. FMAT was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Basic Materials ETFs Poised for a September Bounce
data.text: Underperforming materials stocks may receive a boost from supportive policy action in September. Trade the sector using these ETFs.
